title: Fluffy Tangy Argentinian Custard Powder Stir-fry
description: This tangy and fluffy dish features custard powder in a gluten-free-friendly Argentinean stir-fry made with sous-vide technique for an extra layer of flavor.

ingredients.name: Custard powder
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free custard powder if available

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Regular soy sauce or tamari for a vegan option

instructions: In a small bowl, mix custard powder with gluten-free flour until no lumps remain. Set aside.
Place the mixture into the sous-vaid bag and vacuum seal it. Cook for 30 minutes at 82°C.
While cooking, in a wok or skillet, heat peanut oil over medium-high heat. Add finely chopped onion and minced garlic, sautéing until onions are translucent.
Add red pepper flakes to the wok if using, stirring well to combine with the onions and garlic. Cook for an additional minute.
Stir in cooked custard powder mixture into the wok and add soy sauce (or tamari) and ketchup. Stir well to incorporate all ingredients thoroughly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
Enjoy your tangy and fluffy Argentinean custard powder stir-fry!
